maay_maay.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Conversion factor = ratio u dhigma 1 (tusaale, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Ku dhufashadeedu waxay beddeshaa unit-ka iyada oo aan beddelin qiimaha. SI prefixes (kilo, milli) waa powers of 10 — kaliya wareeji decimal-ka.
maay_maay.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Dherer, mass, volume, temperature, waqti, energy, pressure. Rule-ka kaliya ee muhiimka ah: la soco units tallaabo kasta. Haddii jawaabtaada kama danbaysta ay tahay m² marka aad rabtay seconds, khalad ayaad meel sare ka samaysay.
maay_maay.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Conversions maalinlaha ah (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) iyo AP / SAT / lab measurements. Su'aal kasta waxay muujisaa conversion factor kadib jawaabtaada, si aad u dhisto muscle memory.
maay_maay.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Real-world unit-conversion scenarios: gas mileage, recipe scaling, dosage calculations, travel-distance estimates. Word problems waa 80% reading comprehension + 20% conversion math.
maay_maay.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: SI prefix kastaa waa power of 10. Slide-garee source iyo target exponents si aad u dareemto sida scales-ku u kala fog yihiin — skill-ka aasaasiga ah ee ka danbeeya scientific notation iyo Fermi estimates.
maay_maay.question: 🧠 Su'aal
maay_maay.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Guji Generate si aad u hesho word problem AI sameeyay
maay_maay.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 orders of magnitude — ilmo adeer dhow (cm→m).
maay_maay.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Hagaaji source iyo target exponents (10^N). Widget wuxuu magnitude change u kala saaraa 5 bands oo kala duwan. Score ma jiro, reveal ma jiro.
maay_maay.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Hypothesis: Real-world examples-kee ayaa magnitude band kasta gaadha?
maay_maay.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Barbardhig cm→km, mm→light-year. Immisa OOM mid kasta?
maay_maay.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Maxaa scientists loogu tababaraa orders of magnitude?
maay_maay.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Sharax sababta dimensional reasoning ee OOM badan uu u adag yahay.
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Design note: discrete 5-state magnitude marker; error score ma jiro; reveal ma jiro — by design.
maay_maay.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Metric Prefixes — Powers of 10 atoms ilaa galaxies
